purpose: Prospectively repeat one frozen synthetic v2 instrument to observe execution availability and exact-version outcome stability. This is calibration evidence, not a capability or professional-validity study.

attempt_schedule.task_level_retry_policy: Do not rerun or replace an attempt after any canary, provider, service, artifact, or grading outcome. Retain every declared attempt. Provider-library behavior inside the pinned Hermes runtime is not altered or supplemented.
attempt_schedule.stop_policy: Run all three declared attempts unless the zero-call canary fails, included-cost status is unavailable, intentional spend would be incurred, or execution would violate repository safety boundaries. A fail-closed stop retains completed/failed rows and records unstarted IDs without substitution.

configured_system.provider_cost_gate: Proceed only through the existing authenticated provider path with provider-reported included usage and no intentional paid-service action. Preserve usage and reported estimated_cost_usd for every completed provider invocation.

retained_exact_version_witness.eligibility_rule: Include as a historical exact-version witness only after replay verifies all frozen task, workspace, launcher, grader, configured-system, input-manifest, and retained-evidence hashes.

attempt_eligibility.availability_denominator: Every declared attempt ID, including canary, provider/service, incomplete-output, and environment failures.
attempt_eligibility.service_available: The launcher process returns zero and retains provider usage plus all three required outputs.
attempt_eligibility.valid_trial: The zero-call canary passes; task inputs are unchanged; protected state is unchanged; launcher returns zero; usage and both requested task artifacts exist; and post-hoc grade marks eligible.
attempt_eligibility.substantive_denominator: Only valid trials. Invalid, provider/service, and incomplete attempts remain visible but are excluded from substantive outcome counts.
attempt_eligibility.no_post_outcome_tuning: Do not modify the task, workspace, launcher, grader, eligibility, outcome mapping, schedule, or attempt IDs after execution begins.

reporting.cluster: one synthetic task and one configured system; attempts are repeated executions, not an independent task sample
estimates: typed outcome counts among valid trials
reporting.uncertainty: two-sided 95% Clopper-Pearson exact binomial intervals for descriptive attempt-level proportions; do not interpret as task-population or professional-capability uncertainty
reporting.historical_comparison: Report the verified retained v2 witness separately and in an explicitly labeled exact-version combined descriptive row. Never pool v1.
reporting.claim_ceiling: Observed repeat behavior for one frozen internal synthetic task/configured system only. No treatment effect, expert validity, professional competence, general capability, cross-domain generalization, real-world safety, production fitness, or readiness.
